query:
SELECT wdf.*, w.code, w.full_name 
FROM worker_daily_finance wdf
JOIN workers w ON wdf.worker_id = w.id
WHERE w.code = 'R01' AND wdf.work_date = '2026-02-02';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT wdf.*, w.code, w.full_name 
FROM worker_daily_finance wdf
JOIN workers w ON wdf.worker_id = w.id
WHERE w.code = 'R01' AND wdf.work_date = '2026-02-02';
